current_caption: George Osborne had in June 2010 set out plans to eliminate budget deficit by March 20106 Photograph Facundo ArrizabalagaEPA

current_caption: The eurozone s other members Germany in particular fear Greece will need an even larger bailout the second time
true_image_context: Alexis Tsipras is welcomed by the European commission president JeanClaude Juncker in Brussels on Monday
current_caption_zh: 欧元区其他成员国，尤其是德国，担心希腊第二次将需要更大规模的救助。
